// ACTIVE GAME PROJECT

SELFARIA: THE EVIL GODDESS OF FATE

IN DEVELOPMENT

SELFARIA

// THE EVIL GODDESS OF FATE  ·  ORBITAL WORLD STUDIOS

Selfaria: The Evil Goddess of Fate is an indie RPG developed solo by Cory Krome under Orbital World Studios. Set in a richly detailed fantasy world, players navigate towns, treacherous dungeons, and face off against enemies in a classic turn-based battle system.

The game features original map design, custom character art, and a hand-crafted world built with passion for the golden age of Japanese RPGs.

  • Classic top-down RPG world with detailed town environments
  • Dangerous dungeons including lava caverns and maze layouts
  • Turn-based battle system — Attack, Special, Guard, Item
  • Original character design — protagonist Godric
  • Hand-crafted maps with environmental storytelling
  • Anime-inspired visual style throughout
  • Solo developed — design, art, and programming by Cory Krome

// 3D ENVIRONMENT WORK

CONVENTION GAME ROOM

IN PROGRESS

CONVENTION GAME ROOM

// 3D ENVIRONMENT · ESPORTS ARENA · STYLIZED

A full-scale convention gaming space built in Blender — from a 32-player PC zone and tournament main stage to arcade cabinets with hand-crafted 2D pixel art game screens.

  • 32-player PC gaming setup with custom gaming chairs
  • Main esports tournament stage with rig lighting + big screens
  • Arcade cabinets: Street Racer, Gun'em, Western Showdown
  • Fantasy Soda vending machine with 8 custom-textured flavors
  • Convention entrance gate with security queue layout
  • Mixed 2D texture art + 3D modeling (Blender + Krita)
COMPLETION85%
// ARCADE ZONE

ARCADE CABINET LINEUP

Street Racer, Gun'em, and Western Showdown with unique 2D pixel art screens painted in Krita. Neon floor lighting applied.

// ARCADE ZONE

SWORDS & SHIELDS · WESTERN SHOWDOWN

Close-up of both cabinets showing custom pixel art screens and hand-painted cabinet art in full detail.

// PC GAMING ZONE

32-PLAYER PC ZONE

Blue partition chairs, dual-monitor stations, and vending machine visible in the background. All assets modeled in Blender.

// PROP ART

FANTASY SODA MACHINE

8 original soda flavors each with a hand-painted Krita label — Ice Sword, Pink Princess, Dark Portal, and more.

// ENVIRONMENT

CONVENTION ENTRANCE GATE

Sci-fi security gate with hexagonal neon paneling, crowd barriers, and ticketing booths.

// ENVIRONMENT

ENTRY QUEUE LAYOUT

Early blockout establishing spatial scale, flow, and architectural framing for the full venue.

// 2D ART & TEXTURES

TEXTURE WORK

Custom-painted in Krita using a stylized, anime-inspired aesthetic rooted in 32-bit art traditions. Each texture brings personality to 3D models. Future texture packs will be sold as game-ready assets.

ICE SWORD SODA

Snowflake mandala with central sword motif.

PINK PRINCESS SODA

Jeweled crown with sparkle effects.

DARK PORTAL SODA

Swirling purple void with yellow energy ring.

QUEENS PURPLE SODA

Royal crown on vivid magenta.

HELL'S ORANGE SODA

Fiery lava texture with scorched earth tones.

MOUNTAIN CHERRY SODA

Bold red diagonal with cherry art.

SOUR LIME SODA

Bright lime greens on a bold diagonal layout.

CREAMED SPICE SODA

Warm vanilla and spice with star anise motifs.
